_comment: Sample seed data for Otterotter. Replace/augment via the Telegram pipeline (Phase 2). 'type' values: jam | workshop | festival | retreat | class. 'featured' powers paid highlighting (Phase 4).

events.title: Copenhagen Contact Jam
events.description: Open weekly contact improvisation jam. All levels welcome. Warm-up at start, free dancing after.

events.title: CI Lab Berlin — Underscore
events.description: Monthly Underscore practice followed by an evening jam. Bring water and comfortable clothes.

events.title: ECITE Freiburg — Teachers Exchange
events.description: International CI teachers exchange. A week of research, jams and shared facilitation.

events.title: Sensing the Space — Weekend Workshop
events.description: Two-day workshop on spatial awareness and weight-sharing. Intermediate level.

events.title: Göteborg Sunday Jam
events.description: Relaxed Sunday afternoon jam at Skogen. Donation-based.

events.title: Intro to Contact Improvisation
events.description: Beginner-friendly drop-in class. No partner or experience needed.

events.title: Helsinki Contact Jam
events.description: Biweekly jam with a short guided opening. Newcomers welcome.

events.title: Amsterdam CI Festival
events.description: Four-day festival: classes, labs, live music jams and performances.

events.title: Jam de Contact Improvisation Paris
events.description: Weekly jam in a bright studio near République. Live music once a month.

events.title: Embodied Ecology Retreat
events.description: Five-day eco-somatic retreat by the Atlantic. Movement, nature immersion, authentic movement.

events.title: Fluid Bodies Workshop
events.description: Weekend workshop blending CI and Body-Mind Centering principles.

events.title: Prague Contact Jam
events.description: Open jam in a community dance space. Donation entry.

events.title: Somatic Nature Day
events.description: One-day eco-somatic intensive in the Vienna woods. Continuum and deep ecology embodiment.

events.title: Malmö Contact Jam
events.description: Cross-border jam, popular with the Copenhagen community. Easy to reach by train.

events.title: Eco-Somatic Weekend — Forest & Floor
events.description: Weekend retreat blending indoor floor work with forest sensing at a Danish folk high school.
